name: Bug Report

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Affected Area
- [ ] Home / Hero
- [ ] About / Resume Timeline / Testimonials
- [ ] Skills
- [ ] Projects (cards, iframe previews)
- [ ] Case Study page (`/case-study/:slug`)
- [ ] Blog (`/blog`, `/blog/:slug`)
- [ ] Contact form
- [ ] Hire Me page
- [ ] Navbar / Footer
- [ ] Theme toggle (Dark / Light / System)
- [ ] Language toggle (EN / HI / MR)
- [ ] AI Chatbot ("Hardik AI")
- [ ] 404 page / Space Shooter game
- [ ] 3D background / Scene3D
- [ ] Background music
- [ ] Resume PDF download
- [ ] Other: ___

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Recording
If applicable, attach screenshots or a short screen recording.

## Console / Network Errors
Paste any errors from the browser DevTools console or failing network requests.

```
<paste here>
```

## Environment
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17]
- **Device**: [e.g., Desktop, iPhone 15, Pixel 8, iPad]
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, iOS 17, Android 14]
- **Viewport**: [e.g., 1440×900, 390×844]
- **Theme**: [Dark / Light / System]
- **Hosting**: [Lovable preview / Vercel / Netlify / local dev]

## Reproducibility
- [ ] Always
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Only once

## Additional Context
Anything else worth knowing (recent changes, related issues, etc.).
